reviews.comment:
Es mi Estación de Servicio !! Atención, amabilidad y siempre una sonrisa, aunque estén congelados..no tengo fotos, no podés usar celu o máquina por seguridad.
Está el ACA, todo remodelado, y además tiene un importante camplng, con todas las comodidades, a pasos del centro San Martín de los Andes. Neuquén, Argentina...

(Translated by Google)
It's my gas station! Service, kindness, and always a smile, even if they're frozen... I don't have any photos, and you can't use a cell phone or a smart phone for security reasons.
There's the ACA, completely remodeled, and it also has a large campsite, with all the amenities, just steps from downtown San Martín de los Andes. Neuquén, Argentina...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzcnJMbklBEAE

reviews.comment:
Espectacular, excelente personal, recomiendo por el buen trato de  cafeteria Y playa. No pude ingresar al camping porque no se permiten mascotas. Pero hay mejores y más económicos, a no desesperar.

(Translated by Google)
Spectacular, excellent staff, I recommend it for the great service at the cafe and on the beach. I couldn't camp because pets aren't allowed. But there are better and cheaper options, so don't despair.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzNXBQMTlBRRAB
